implementation_scope.source_type: repeatable real TauTuiApp Textual rendering proof with fixture session and structured Tau Memory events
implementation_scope.fixture_prompt: How does Tau handle a CWE-287 SPARTA evidence case?

what_changed: Added tau_coding.tui.proof.render_textual_tui_memory_stage_proof as a repeatable proof generator for the real Textual TUI renderer.
Added `tau tui-proof` to write a proof.json receipt plus tau-textual-tui-memory-stage.svg screenshot.
The command is intentionally fixture-backed and marks the receipt mocked=true/live=false so it cannot be mistaken for live provider or live Memory proof.

lint.command: cd /home/graham/workspace/experiments/tau && uv run ruff check src/tau_coding/tui/proof.py src/tau_coding/cli.py tests/test_tui_proof.py

cli_proof.command: cd /home/graham/workspace/experiments/tau && uv run tau tui-proof --out-dir /tmp/tau-tui-proof-cli-20260628T2044 --run-id loop2-tau-stress-math_add-1782507220-da39d0 --prompt 'How does Tau handle a CWE-287 SPARTA evidence case?' --next-agent reviewer --route COMPLIANCE
text_assertions: How does Tau handle a CWE-287 SPARTA evidence case?

proves: Tau now has a repeatable CLI command for producing a real Textual TUI Memory-stage render receipt.
The generated Textual TUI screenshot visibly shows the Memory-stage label Accessing Memory.
The proof generator preserves explicit mocked/live boundaries in machine-readable output.
does_not_prove: A live provider call from the Textual TUI.
A live Memory backend call from the Textual TUI process.
An interactive Textual TUI embedded in UX Lab #tau.
Same-message end-to-end synchronization between the live React chat and a running Textual TUI process.

next_stop_condition: Use `tau tui-proof` as the repeatable TUI side of a future same-run chat/TUI synchronization proof, or replace it with a PTY-backed live Textual process when that integration is implemented.
